resolvedQuestions: Q1: generic-query recall lift — simple-tier route skips channels + HyDE gated to deep/low-confidence; route generic/low-confidence queries to the deep expansion path
Q2: request-quality aggregation — replace AND-gate with top-dominant + margin-OR-ratio disjunction; compute qualityRatio over min(N,K)
Q3: 10->1 truncation — truncateToBudget greedy hard-break starves tail (hybrid-search.ts:2768); skip-don't-break + min-floor + summary-first
Q4: reranker — do NOT re-add a model reranker first; free cosine-primary top-N reorder, measure, then maybe LLM-judge on deep path only
Q5: FSRS cold-tier — leave as-is; cold crowding empirically near-inert; lowest priority
Q6: calibration — band non-monotonic in relevance (cosine only 40% weight); rebalance scorePrior + recalibrate against labeled set
keyFindings: Shared root cause: pipeline reads relative ranking signals (RRF magnitude, heuristic set-agreement) where it needs absolute relevance, then compounds with conservative AND-gates and hard truncations. Packet-015 fixed only the calibration-prior instance.

HyDE gate is 'deep + low-confidence queries only' (hyde.ts:6); simple-tier (<=3 terms) queries get channel-reduced routes (query-plan.ts:239) — recall machinery is suppressed exactly where it is most needed.
assessRequestQuality AND-gate (topScore>=0.7 AND qualityRatio>=0.6) lets a weak tail veto a strong top hit (confidence-scoring.ts:310-312).
truncateToBudget runs unconditionally at budget 4000 and hard-breaks on first overflow (hybrid-search.ts:1991,2768) — a single large top memory starves the tail -> count:1.
Cross-encoder reranker was an inert no-op before removal (stage3-rerank.ts:109-116); cheapest win is a cosine-primary reorder of top-N.
FSRS deprecated tier = 0.25x stability (4x faster decay); cold crowding near-inert; leave unchanged.
Confidence band caps at 0.88 and is non-monotonic in relevance: a 0.89 cosine isolated hit scores only 0.446 'medium' (confidence-scoring.ts:253-264).
The six fixes are coupled and must ship as one dependency-sequenced bundle: P3 floor -> P2 quality -> P1 recall -> P6 calibration -> P4 reorder -> (P5 no-op).
ruledOutDirections: Flags are off (they are ON; problem is per-query routing)
Embedding model too weak for short queries (channel-reduction explains symptom)
Gate request-quality on topScore only (keep margin-OR-ratio guard)
Dynamic token budget OFF disables truncation (it runs at default 4000)
stage4 per-tier state limits cause count:1 (stateLimitsApplied:false live)
Re-add cross-encoder/local reranker as first step (was inert, no lift evidence)
Retune cold-tier FSRS multipliers (cold crowding near-inert)
Raise 0.88 cap toward 1.0 (fix monotonicity + calibration instead)
